summary: Clear soundboard mix with solid performances, though a few song changes feel a bit loose.
review: The recording is a well‑balanced soundboard capture that lets every voice and instrument shine, especially highlighting Keith’s keyboard work and the late‑show Space. The band delivers an energetic set – Jerry’s searing ’76 tone and Phil on a mission stand out – but some transitions like Help on the Way are noted as a little loose.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 4‑star reviews point to a good show with strong playing and a clear soundboard recording; minor performance looseness keeps the rating just below excellent.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Voices are mixed well and clear, overall crisp soundboard capture; some reviewers note a bit of looseness in song changes but no major drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic and tight overall, with strong vocal blends and lively playing; a few transitions (e.g., Help on the Way) feel slightly loose.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His usual ’76 searing guitar tone is present and praised.
band_member_comments.Phil: Described as being ‘on a mission’, indicating an inspired bass performance.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s keyboard work sounds great, according to reviewers.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill (Billy) is noted as having a lot of fun behind the kit.
